__inputs.name: DS_GITHUB_GOVERNANCE_BIGQUERY
__inputs.label: GitHub Governance BigQuery
__inputs.description: Select the configured BigQuery datasource for the github_governance dataset.

description: Repository and organization drilldown over curated GitHub Governance activity. v10 uses canonical tokenized query-variable selectors for Organization, Repository, and Actor.

options.content:
**Use the filter dropdowns to search, then select an exact value.**  
Open **Organization**, type part of an org token such as `bzrk`, and choose the matching org. Then open **Repository**; it refreshes based on the selected organization. The **Actor** list similarly narrows after the org/repository choice.  
Organization and repository values are tokenized from the comma-delimited source fields before they reach the dropdown.

panels.title: Governance Events
panels.description: Total curated governance events in scope.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) 
  AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(org, ''), ',')) AS org_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(org_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$organization'), '%')
  )
)
  AND (
  '$repository' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$repository'), '%')
  )
)
  AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
  AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
  AND (
  '$actor' = 'ALL'
  OR LOWER(COALESCE(actor, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$actor'), '%')
)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND review_priority IN ('CRITICAL','HIGH') 
  AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(org, ''), ',')) AS org_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(org_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$organization'), '%')
  )
)
  AND (
  '$repository' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$repository'), '%')
  )
)
  AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
  AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
  AND (
  '$actor' = 'ALL'
  OR LOWER(COALESCE(actor, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$actor'), '%')
)

panels.title: Distinct Actors
panels.description: Unique identities that initiated governance-relevant changes.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT actor) AS value FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND actor IS NOT NULL 
  AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(org, ''), ',')) AS org_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(org_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$organization'), '%')
  )
)
  AND (
  '$repository' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$repository'), '%')
  )
)
  AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
  AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
  AND (
  '$actor' = 'ALL'
  OR LOWER(COALESCE(actor, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$actor'), '%')
)

panels.title: Control Changes
panels.description: Branch, merge, and future security-control changes.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND governance_area IN ('BRANCH_AND_MERGE_CONTROLS','ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE') 
  AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(org, ''), ',')) AS org_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(org_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$organization'), '%')
  )
)
  AND (
  '$repository' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$repository'), '%')
  )
)
  AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
  AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
  AND (
  '$actor' = 'ALL'
  OR LOWER(COALESCE(actor, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$actor'), '%')
)

SELECT TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(event_time, DAY) AS time, governance_area AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value
   FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
   WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) 
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(org, ''), ',')) AS org_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(org_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$organization'), '%')
  )
)
AND (
  '$repository' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$repository'), '%')
  )
)
AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
AND (
  '$actor' = 'ALL'
  OR LOWER(COALESCE(actor, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$actor'), '%')
)

   GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time

SELECT
     COUNTIF(governance_area='BRANCH_AND_MERGE_CONTROLS') AS BRANCH_AND_MERGE_CONTROLS,
     COUNTIF(governance_area='ACCESS_GOVERNANCE') AS ACCESS_GOVERNANCE,
     COUNTIF(governance_area='OAUTH_ACCESS_GOVERNANCE') AS OAUTH_ACCESS_GOVERNANCE,
     COUNTIF(governance_area='IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY') AS IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY,
     COUNTIF(governance_area='ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE') AS ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE
   FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) 
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(org, ''), ',')) AS org_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(org_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$organization'), '%')
  )
)
AND (
  '$repository' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$repository'), '%')
  )
)
AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
AND (
  '$actor' = 'ALL'
  OR LOWER(COALESCE(actor, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$actor'), '%')
)

SELECT COUNTIF(review_priority='CRITICAL') AS CRITICAL,
          COUNTIF(review_priority='HIGH') AS HIGH,
          COUNTIF(review_priority='MEDIUM') AS MEDIUM,
          COUNTIF(review_priority='LOW') AS LOW
   FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) 
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(org, ''), ',')) AS org_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(org_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$organization'), '%')
  )
)
AND (
  '$repository' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$repository'), '%')
  )
)
AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
AND (
  '$actor' = 'ALL'
  OR LOWER(COALESCE(actor, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$actor'), '%')
)

SELECT COALESCE(actor,'UNKNOWN') AS actor, COUNT(*) AS events
   FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND actor IS NOT NULL 
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(org, ''), ',')) AS org_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(org_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$organization'), '%')
  )
)
AND (
  '$repository' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$repository'), '%')
  )
)
AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
AND (
  '$actor' = 'ALL'
  OR LOWER(COALESCE(actor, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$actor'), '%')
)

   GROUP BY actor ORDER BY events DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Branch and Merge-Control Changes
panels.description: Branch protection, merge, and required-check changes.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(event_time, DAY) AS time, governance_event_type AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value
   FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
   WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND governance_area='BRANCH_AND_MERGE_CONTROLS' 
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(org, ''), ',')) AS org_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(org_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$organization'), '%')
  )
)
AND (
  '$repository' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$repository'), '%')
  )
)
AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
AND (
  '$actor' = 'ALL'
  OR LOWER(COALESCE(actor, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$actor'), '%')
)

   GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time

panels.title: High / Critical Review Queue
panels.description: Critical and high events, priority first then newest.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT event_time, governance_event_type, review_priority, governance_area, action,
          actor AS initiated_by, affected_identity, org, repository, review_reason
   FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
   WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND review_priority IN ('CRITICAL','HIGH') 
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(org, ''), ',')) AS org_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(org_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$organization'), '%')
  )
)
AND (
  '$repository' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$repository'), '%')
  )
)
AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
AND (
  '$actor' = 'ALL'
  OR LOWER(COALESCE(actor, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$actor'), '%')
)

   ORDER BY CASE review_priority WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 1 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, event_time DESC
   LIMIT 100

SELECT event_time, governance_event_type, review_priority, governance_area, action,
          actor AS initiated_by, affected_identity, org, repository, review_reason
   FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
   WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) 
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(org, ''), ',')) AS org_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(org_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$organization'), '%')
  )
)
AND (
  '$repository' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$repository'), '%')
  )
)
AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
AND (
  '$actor' = 'ALL'
  OR LOWER(COALESCE(actor, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$actor'), '%')
)

   ORDER BY event_time DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Recent Control Changes
panels.description: Latest branch, merge, required-check, and security-control changes.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT event_time, governance_event_type, review_priority, action, actor AS initiated_by,
          org, repository, review_reason
   FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
   WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
     AND governance_area IN ('BRANCH_AND_MERGE_CONTROLS','ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE') 
AND (
  '$organization' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(org, ''), ',')) AS org_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(org_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$organization'), '%')
  )
)
AND (
  '$repository' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')))
      LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$repository'), '%')
  )
)
AND ('$governance_area' = 'ALL' OR governance_area = '$governance_area')
AND ('$review_priority' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '$review_priority')
AND (
  '$actor' = 'ALL'
  OR LOWER(COALESCE(actor, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER('$actor'), '%')
)

   ORDER BY event_time DESC LIMIT 100

list.name: organization
list.label: Organization
list.query:
SELECT org_name
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS org_name, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(org_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')) AS org_name,
    1 AS sort_order
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(org, ''), ',')) AS org_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(org_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')) != ''
)
ORDER BY sort_order, org_name
LIMIT 5000
list.definition:
SELECT org_name
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS org_name, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(org_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')) AS org_name,
    1 AS sort_order
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(org, ''), ',')) AS org_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(org_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')) != ''
)
ORDER BY sort_order, org_name
LIMIT 5000

list.name: repository
list.label: Repository
list.query:
SELECT repository_name
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS repository_name, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')) AS repository_name,
    1 AS sort_order
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')) != ''
    AND (
      '$organization' = 'ALL'
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(org, ''), ',')) AS org_token
        WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(org_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')) = '$organization'
      )
    )
)
ORDER BY sort_order, repository_name
LIMIT 10000
list.definition:
SELECT repository_name
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS repository_name, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')) AS repository_name,
    1 AS sort_order
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')) != ''
    AND (
      '$organization' = 'ALL'
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(org, ''), ',')) AS org_token
        WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(org_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')) = '$organization'
      )
    )
)
ORDER BY sort_order, repository_name
LIMIT 10000

list.name: actor
list.label: Actor
list.query:
SELECT actor_name
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS actor_name, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT
    actor AS actor_name,
    1 AS sort_order
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND actor IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      '$organization' = 'ALL'
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(org, ''), ',')) AS org_token
        WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(org_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')) = '$organization'
      )
    )
    AND (
      '$repository' = 'ALL'
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
        WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')) = '$repository'
      )
    )
)
ORDER BY sort_order, actor_name
LIMIT 10000

    AND (
      '$repository' = 'ALL'

        SELECT 1

        WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]"]', '')) = '$repository'

ORDER BY sort_order, actor_name
LIMIT 10000

title: Repository Governance Drilldown
